boat.name: Amica
boat.full_description: Little is known about 'Amica' until 1977 when she went to St Peter Port. Since 2013 she has cruised the west coast of Ireland, Scotland, including the Outer Hebrides and Brittany
boat.construction_details: Carvel construction - mahogany splined planking above the waterline, caulked pitch pine below. Timbers are rock elm and oak. She has a mahogany transom. Shelf and carlings are larch or spruce. Coamings, cabin sole, hatches are Burma teak.Deck is marine ply glued and fibreglass covered. Keel 2 ton iron.
boat.short_description: Amica is a Sterling Class designed by Kim Holman.
